# Request Context

Request Context copy-first generated block.

Generated from ../agent-native/packages/core/src/server/request-context.ts (@agent-native/core@0.79.19).

## Copy instructions

Run `pnpm --dir catalog/blocks/request-context test` and `pnpm --dir catalog/blocks/request-context typecheck`, then copy the files under `src/` into your app.

## Caveats

- Requires Node AsyncLocalStorage; edge runtimes without node:async_hooks need a host-specific adapter.

## When not to use

- Do not use in purely static/browser-only code.
